zh.Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, England: 英國坎布利其爾維波爾
zh.Courtstown,Kilkenny,Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼庫史托 豪斯
zh.Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭坎布利其爾維波爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Wimpole de Gras於1285年出生在英國坎布利其爾維波爾時，他的父親William LeGras Sr15歲，母親Lady Catherine Rupe of Cork13歲。他於1313年與Paulina Grace de Allington在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾維波爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1382年在英國英格蘭肯特享年97歲。

zh-hans.Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, England: 英国坎布利其爾維波爾
zh-hans.Courtstown,Kilkenny,Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼庫史托 豪斯
zh-hans.Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, England, United: 英国英格兰坎布利其爾維波爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Wimpole de Gras于1285年出生在英国坎布利其爾維波爾时，他的父亲William LeGras Sr15岁，母亲Lady Catherine Rupe of Cork13岁。他于1313年与Paulina Grace de Allington在英国英格兰坎布利其爾維波爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1382年在英国英格兰肯特享年97岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gras
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Clemence, Francoise, Michel, Philippe.  Spanish Francisco, Baudilio, Guadalupe, Jesus, Jose Pedro, Juan, Juana.  German Dieter.
French and Catalan: nickname for a stout person, from gras ‘fat’ (from Latin crassus, Old French cras). Compare Degrace .
French: habitational name from (Le) Gras, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Degrace
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Monique.
French Canadian (Degrâce): altered form of Catalan Gras ‘fat’. Compare Degrasse .
French (Degrâce): habitational name for someone from La Grâce in Marne, named from La Grâce-Notre-Dame, an abbey founded in the 13th century near Montmirail.

variants.name: Graeser
meanings: German (also Gräser): variant of the topographic name Gras , the -er suffix denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Wimpole
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably English: variant of Wimpole, a habitational name from Wimpole in Cambridgeshire, named with the Old English personal name Wina + pōl ‘pool’.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Wimpole de Gras was born in 1285, in Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, William LeGras Sr, was 15 and his mother, Lady Catherine Rupe of Cork, was 13. He married Paulina Grace de Allington in 1313, in Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1382, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 97.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Wimpole de Gras est né en 1285, à Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, William LeGras Sr, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Lady Catherine Rupe of Cork, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Paulina Grace de Allington en 1313, à Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1382, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 97 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Wimpole de Gras 1285 in Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William LeGras Sr 15 und seine Mutter Lady Catherine Rupe of Cork 13. Er hat 1313 in Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Paulina Grace de Allington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1382 im Alter von 97 Jahren in Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Wimpole de Gras è nato il nel 1285 nel Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, William LeGras Sr, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Lady Catherine Rupe of Cork, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Paulina Grace de Allington nel 1313, nel Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1382, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 97 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Wimpole de Grasが1285年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアウィンプオルで生まれた時，父William LeGras Srは15歳，母Lady Catherine Rupe of Corkは13歳であった。1313年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアウィンプオルでPaulina Grace de Allingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1382年にイギリスイギリスケントで97歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Wimpole de Gras(이)가 1285년 영국 캄브리지실르 위포일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William LeGras Sr(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Catherine Rupe of Cork(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1313년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 위포일에서 Paulina Grace de Allington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1382년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 97세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Wimpole de Gras nasceu em 1285, em Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William LeGras Sr, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Lady Catherine Rupe of Cork, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Paulina Grace de Allington em 1313, em Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1382, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 97 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Wimpole de Gras родился в 1285 г. в местности вимпол, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William LeGras Sr было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Catherine Rupe of Cork, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Paulina Grace de Allington в 1313 г. в местности вимпол, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1382 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 97 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Wimpole de Gras nació en 1285, en Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William LeGras Sr, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Lady Catherine Rupe of Cork, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Paulina Grace de Allington en 1313, en Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1382, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 97 años.
